description: An analyst notices a sudden, unexplained spike in website traffic in a report and needs to find the cause.

nodes.task_description: Identify the exact date and time of the traffic spike from the analytics dashboard.
Analyze the referral sources for the traffic during the spike.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent drills down into the traffic sources.

nodes.task_description: Discover that the spike was caused by a large amount of bot traffic from a single referral source.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the root cause as non-human traffic.

nodes.task_description: Apply a filter to the analytics view to exclude the bot traffic for more accurate reporting.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates and applies a filter to clean the data going forward.
